name: hyperframes
description: > READ THIS FIRST for any request to make, create, edit, animate, or render a video, animation, or motion graphic — a promo, explainer, captioned clip, title card, overlay, slideshow / interactive deck, or any composition. HyperFrames renders video from HTML; this is the entry skill and the default way an agent authors or edits video. It routes the request to the right specialized workflow and points to the HyperFrames domain skills, so read it before any other video or animation skill instead o
